socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +50% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills which create Minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 20% increased Minion maximum Life
Supported Skills have 49% more Minion maximum Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +3 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
explicitMods: Can use Items requiring up to Level 100
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of the Necromancer
explicitMods: Grants 182% of Life Recovery to Minions
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: The Gull
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Cold Gems
Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
75% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
50% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1077 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 50% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants fire resistance to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 51% additional Fire Resistance
You and nearby allies gain 4% additional maximum Fire Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 16% increased Movement Speed
You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Cast Speed
You and nearby allies gain 25% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Atziri's Disfavour
explicitMods: +30% to Quality of Socketed Support Gems
25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
flavourText: "I do not believe in disguising my disappointment."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Dread Circle
implicitMods: Cannot roll Modifiers of Non-Fire Damage Types
explicitMods: 72% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected
flavourText: The embers of the Red Pyre yet glow.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Blunderbore
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems
explicitMods: 72% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
You have Lesser Brutal Shrine Buff
You have Lesser Massive Shrine Buff
flavourText: The giant cares not for the ants.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 137% increased Critical Strike Chance
Supported Skills have +2% to Critical Strike Chance
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills.
explicitMods: Projectiles from Supported Skills Pierce 4 additional Targets
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Projectile Damage
Supported Skills deal 20% more Projectile Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Launches unpredictable sparks in all directions that move randomly until they hit an enemy or expire.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, brand skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat an additional 2 times
Supported Skills have 65% more Cast Speed
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Supported Skills have 26% increased Area of Effect per Repeat
Supported Skills deal 16% more Spell Damage per Repeat
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: She gazed into the mirror...
and the mirror gazed back.

name: Skull Talons
implicitMods: 30% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit
explicitMods: 27% increased Elemental Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that have a cooldown. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3000% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Dire Curio
explicitMods: 1% chance to receive additional Delirium items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
2% chance to receive additional Unique items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
8% chance in Heists for Orbs of Alteration to drop as Chaos Orbs instead
18% increased Rarity of Items dropped in Heists

name: Carrion Pendant
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Skill Gems

enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage

should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."
